title: Mamma Mia!
full_description: Mamma Mia! weaves the songs of ABBA into an original story of Sophie, who is about to get married and wants her father at her wedding — but first has to work out which of three men her mother is actually referring to in her diary. Set on a Greek island, it's bright, warm, and effortlessly joyful — a show that exists purely to make people happy, and succeeds completely.
ai_summary: The ABBA jukebox musical — set on a sun-drenched Greek island, centred on a mystery about paternity, and designed from first to last to send the audience home singing. One of the most purely enjoyable shows in musical theatre.
